problem_statement: Reduce the weight of an aluminum heat exchanger used in automotive cooling without degrading its thermal transfer performance under a 1.5 kW load.
notes: Classic engineering contradiction: weight (improving 1) vs thermal capacity / power (worsening 9 or 21). altshuller_39x39 is canonical.

problem_statement: Make a Python service more modular and pluggable so we can swap storage backends, but every refactor we attempt makes the codebase more complex and harder for new engineers to read.
notes: Adaptability/Versatility (35) vs Device Complexity (36). altshuller is the catch-all when no software-specific matrix wins.

problem_statement: We need to increase the therapeutic dose of an oncology drug to improve efficacy, but higher doses increase the rate of grade-3+ adverse events in elderly patients. The FDA wants harm-reduction evidence before approval.
notes: Pharmaceutical governance contradiction routes to drug_safety_18x18 (status=domain, governance-reframed). Principles are taxonomy-mapped.

problem_statement: Patients want shorter wait times in the emergency department, but reducing triage time risks missing low-acuity patients who are actually deteriorating, hurting our SERVQUAL responsiveness vs reliability tradeoff.
notes: Healthcare service quality gap with prefixed (S/T) param ids. healthcare_servqual uses S1-S10 for service-quality improving axes and T9-T36 for technical-quality worsening axes; only 13 cells populated. Cell (S2, T25) yields principles 24, 28, 32, 34.

problem_statement: Design a passive fog-water-capture surface inspired by the Namib desert beetle: maximize moisture collection per cm^2 of surface, but more capture surface increases material thickness and weight, defeating the goal of cheap roof-mounted deployment.
notes: BioTRIZ-eligible problem with explicit biomimetic framing. Should NOT route to biotriz_6x6_tech (the technology-derived sibling).

problem_statement: Increase the stiffness of a carbon-fiber wing spar to handle higher gust loads, but every stiffening rib we add increases manufacturing complexity and assembly error rate.
notes: Aerospace mechanical contradiction. Stiffness/strength (14) vs ease of manufacture (32). Canonical Altshuller.

problem_statement: Make our product better.
notes: Pathologically vague. Framer should set framing_confidence=low; the state-driver should emit ask_user kind=clarify_framing per design v6 §22.

problem_statement: I'm trying to decide whether to take a new job in a different city, but I really like my current team. Help me figure this out.
notes: Personal life decision, not a TRIZ contradiction at all. Framer should flag low confidence; state-driver should pause for clarification before any matrix selection.

problem_statement: I want to choose between three paint colors for my living room: cobalt blue, terracotta, or sage green. Which best matches my mid-century modern furniture?
notes: Pure aesthetic preference question. No engineering or service contradiction. After framing, mapper should declare no_clean_mapping=true; state-driver branches to no-clean-mapping report.

problem_statement: I need help brainstorming names for a new fantasy novel about a cartographer who maps imaginary kingdoms. The names should sound vaguely Norse but be original.
notes: Creative writing task — no contradiction structure. No matrix in the registry covers naming conventions; should land in no-clean-mapping branch via mapper self-declaration after Stage A drops every candidate.

problem_statement: We want to increase the cycle speed of our plastic injection-molding press from 30 to 60 parts/minute, but faster cycles raise melt temperature variance, causing surface defects on the finished parts.
notes: Manufacturing throughput vs precision/quality. Speed (9) vs Manufacturing precision (29). altshuller_39x39 wins on canonical status + manufacturing domain overlap.

problem_statement: Increase the torsional rigidity of a sedan unibody chassis to improve handling, but every additional gusset and reinforcement adds curb weight, which kills fuel economy and crash-package ratings.
notes: Automotive mechanical: strength (14) vs weight of moving object (1). Classic contradiction; altshuller_39x39 is canonical.

problem_statement: Boost the operating pressure of a stainless-steel reactor vessel from 10 to 16 bar to push reaction yield, but the higher pressure exceeds the safety factor allowed by ASME BPVC for the existing wall thickness.
notes: Pressure vessel: stress/pressure (11) vs strength (14). altshuller_39x39 canonical mechanical.

problem_statement: Increase the throughput of our robotic spot-welding cell on a Tier-1 automotive line, but pushing past 80 welds/minute degrades nugget penetration and triggers more rework.
notes: Manufacturing speed vs weld strength. heinrich_39x39 is a derived-but-curated mechanical/manufacturing subset; altshuller may also score competitively on canonical status. Either is acceptable. expected_matrix_id=heinrich_39x39 documents the design intent; the synthetic eval may pick altshuller_39x39 if status_bonus dominates.

problem_statement: Add end-to-end TLS 1.3 + mTLS to every microservice hop in our payments backend to satisfy PCI DSS, but the per-hop handshake latency now blows our 50ms p99 SLA for checkout.
notes: Security/vulnerability (44, exclusive to 50x50 extension) vs speed (9). triz_ai_50x50 wins because altshuller_39x39 lacks the security parameter; cybersecurity domain signal is also exclusive to triz_ai_50x50.

problem_statement: Improve the top-1 accuracy of our image-classification model from 87% to 92% by switching to a larger transformer backbone, but inference latency on the edge device jumps from 120ms to 450ms which fails the real-time UX requirement.
notes: Function efficiency (40) vs speed (9). The ai-ml signal pushes triz_ai_50x50 ahead of altshuller_39x39.

problem_statement: Scale our analytics ingestion pipeline from 100k to 5M events/sec without rewriting the downstream batch jobs, but every horizontal-scale change causes ordering and exactly-once delivery regressions.
notes: Scalability (49, exclusive to 50x50) vs reliability (27). triz_ai_50x50 wins on the data-systems and scalability tags.

problem_statement: Reduce the post-marketing surveillance window for a new monoclonal antibody from 5 to 2 years to speed Phase IV evidence, but the shorter window increases the chance of missing rare long-tail adverse events.
notes: Pharmaceutical regulatory tradeoff: surveillance horizon vs harm detection. Routes to drug_safety_18x18 via governance-reframed matrix.

problem_statement: Expand our telehealth platform to handle 3x more concurrent patient video visits per clinician shift, but cramming more visits per hour reduces the empathy and rapport patients self-report on the post-visit SERVQUAL survey.
notes: Service-quality empathy/responsiveness gap vs throughput. healthcare_servqual uses prefixed S/T params and only has 13 populated cells; (S4, T9) is one of them. Selector wins via service domain + service-quality-gap class.

problem_statement: Design a reusable dry adhesive surface inspired by gecko foot setae that can grip vertical glass and detach cleanly on demand, but increasing adhesion area also increases lateral pull-off force, defeating clean release.
notes: Biomimetic structural design. Routes to biotriz_6x6_bio via bio domain + biological-design class. Should NOT pick biotriz_6x6_tech.

problem_statement: Develop a self-healing aerospace composite skin that closes microcracks under flight stress, drawing both from classical fracture-mechanics design rules and from the way human skin remodels collagen after injury.
notes: Triangulation case: should select multiple matrices (altshuller_39x39 for mechanical/aerospace + biotriz_6x6_bio for biomimetic). selected_matrices may include both. expected_matrix_id documents the primary; the synthetic eval compares against the top one only and may pick altshuller_39x39 (canonical wins on score).

problem_statement: Roll out a complex new chemotherapy infusion protocol across 12 community oncology clinics: tighter dosing precision improves drug safety outcomes, but the longer chair time and stricter protocols hurt patient-reported responsiveness on our SERVQUAL surveys.
notes: Triangulation case: should select drug_safety_18x18 (governance/pharmaceutical) + healthcare_servqual (service/healthcare). expected_matrix_id documents the primary; status-bonus + class-match likely puts drug_safety_18x18 ahead.

problem_statement: We need to modernize our stack.
notes: Buzzword without specifics. No improving/worsening pair, no measurable signal. Framer should flag low confidence.

problem_statement: Should our company go open source?
notes: Strategic decision question, not a contradiction. Framer marks low confidence; state-driver pauses for clarification.

problem_statement: Morale on the team has been low lately. What should we do?
notes: Vague organizational concern. No technical contradiction structure. Framer should flag low confidence.

problem_statement: Our system is slow but we are not sure where the bottleneck is and we have not measured anything yet.
notes: Problem with no observability or measurable axes. Framer needs clarification before TRIZ framing is meaningful.

problem_statement: Our marketing director and our head of engineering can't agree on the Q3 roadmap and keep pulling team resources in different directions. How do we get them aligned?
notes: Organizational politics / interpersonal conflict. No engineering, service, or governance matrix covers this. Mapper should declare no_clean_mapping=true.

problem_statement: Help me decide whether to refinance my mortgage now or wait six months for rates to potentially drop.
notes: Personal financial planning, not a TRIZ contradiction. No matrix covers this. Should land in no-clean-mapping branch.

problem_statement: I am redesigning our company logo and need to choose between a serif wordmark or a geometric sans-serif. Which conveys more trust to a fintech audience?
notes: Pure brand-aesthetic preference. No mechanical/service/governance contradiction. Mapper should declare no_clean_mapping.

problem_statement: I want to invent an original dessert recipe that combines Japanese matcha with Italian tiramisu flavor profiles. Suggest a layering scheme.
notes: Culinary creative-writing task, no contradiction structure. No matrix applies. Mapper should self-declare no_clean_mapping.
